title: Habenella oerstedii
intro: Habenella oerstedii, also known as "Lobelia," is a flowering plant species belonging to the bellflower family (Campanulaceae) and is native to Central and South America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include the potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and exhibit neuroprotective effects, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. The bioactive constituents of Habenella oerstedii include alkaloids, saponins, and glycosides, including lobeline, which is responsible for its therapeutic effects. In traditional medicine, Habenella oerstedii is often used to make herbal preparations such as tinctures, teas, and infusions to treat conditions like bronchitis, asthma, and anxiety disorders.
